hypothesis: An autonomous closed-loop Bayesian optimization platform that varies bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration and flow rate, KOH concentration and flow rate, and applied current density can efficiently converge within ~52 experiments to operating conditions that significantly increase reactor yield (and JCO) in reactive carbon electrolyzers compared to random or space-filling search, and these optimized conditions remain effective under realistic mixed bicarbonate–carbonate capture electrolytes.
